name: The Phantom Troupe
description:
CWs for kidnapping, violence, torture and potential non con !!

I promise that more Mouthwashing bots will be coming up soon so dw about that :3

Please lmk how this bot turned out! This is by far the biggest bot I’ve ever made (meaning the most tokens I’ve ever used for a bot idk how else to word it) 😅

~ Hunter x Hunter ~
